$entryId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name', 'score', 'timestamp']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 24 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 9999999 && newData.child('timestamp').isNumber() && newData.child('timestamp').val() > 0 && newData.child('timestamp').val() <= 9999999999999
